title: quercus macrocarpa subsp. eumacrocarpa
intro: Quercus macrocarpa subsp. eumacrocarpa, also known as Bur oak, is a subspecies of the Quercus macrocarpa species, a deciduous oak tree native to North America. The bark and leaves of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Quercus macrocarpa subsp. eumacrocarpa include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as supporting immune function and protecting against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to promote overall well-being and support various health conditions.
